message:
Command `# Long wait - check every 20 minutes for up to 5 hours
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
MAIN_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  sleep 1200   # 20 minutes
  LINES=$(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  MAIN_LINES=$(wc -l < "$MAIN_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  YTAIL=$(tail -1 "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  LR=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR:-DONE} | step=$STEP | synth_lines=$LINES | $YTAIL"
  [ -z "$LR" ] && { echo "=== DONE ==="; break; }
done

echo ""
echo "Final run directory contents:"
ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20
echo ""
echo "Last 50 lines of wrapper_run.log:"
tail -50 "$MAIN_LOG"` executed with exit code -1.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Long wait - check every 20 minutes for up to 5 hours
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
MAIN_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  sleep 1200   # 20 minutes
  LINES=$(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  MAIN_LINES=$(wc -l < "$MAIN_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  YTAIL=$(tail -1 "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  LR=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR:-DONE} | step=$STEP | synth_lines=$LINES | $YTAIL"
  [ -z "$LR" ] && { echo "=== DONE ==="; break; }
done

echo ""
echo "Final run directory contents:"
ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20
echo ""
echo "Last 50 lines of wrapper_run.log:"
tail -50 "$MAIN_LOG"", "timeout": 86400}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "# Long wait - check every 20 minutes for up to 5 hours
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
MAIN_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  sleep 1200   # 20 minutes
  LINES=$(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  MAIN_LINES=$(wc -l < "$MAIN_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  YTAIL=$(tail -1 "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  LR=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR:-DONE} | step=$STEP | synth_lines=$LINES | $YTAIL"
  [ -z "$LR" ] && { echo "=== DONE ==="; break; }
done

echo ""
echo "Final run directory contents:"
ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20
echo ""
echo "Last 50 lines of wrapper_run.log:"
tail -50 "$MAIN_LOG"" timed out
